name: Button

interaction_states.hover: Decrease lightness by 5-10% or apply subtle drop shadow. Use 150ms ease-out transition.
interaction_states.active: Scale down to 0.98 or remove drop shadow to simulate physical press.
interaction_states.focus: Apply 2px offset focus ring matching brand primary color. outline-offset-2.
interaction_states.disabled: Opacity 50%, cursor-not-allowed, grayscale. Do not use tooltips on disabled buttons.
interaction_states.loading: Replace leading icon with spinner or fade text to 0 and show spinner in center. Keep button width fixed to prevent layout shift.

accessibility_rules: Minimum contrast ratio 4.5:1 for text against button background.
Touch target minimum 44x44pt on mobile.
Must use semantic <button> or role='button'.
Icon-only buttons MUST have aria-label.

styling_guidelines.padding: px-4 py-2 for base, px-6 py-3 for lg.
styling_guidelines.typography: font-medium or font-semibold. Avoid light weights for labels.

conversion_notes: Primary buttons should be visually isolated. Use only one primary button per view/section.

name: Card

interaction_states.default: Base surface color (e.g., bg-white or bg-slate-900).
interaction_states.hover: If interactive, elevate shadow (e.g., shadow-md to shadow-xl) and apply subtle transform -translate-y-1. 300ms ease-out.
interaction_states.focus: Focus ring if the entire card is a link. Avoid keyboard traps.

accessibility_rules: If interactive, avoid nested interactive elements (buttons inside a linked card) unless handled with pseudo-element overlays.
Ensure logical DOM order matches visual reading order.
Use <article> or <section> if the card represents a standalone piece of content.

styling_guidelines.padding: p-4, p-6, or p-8 consistent across breakpoints.
styling_guidelines.border_radius: rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Image inside must have matching border-radius minus padding to avoid corner clipping.

name: Dialog / Modal

interaction_states.enter: Animate in: fade overlay, slide up + fade panel. duration-300 ease-out.
interaction_states.exit: Animate out: faster than enter, e.g., duration-200 ease-in.

accessibility_rules: Focus must be trapped inside the modal while open.
Initial focus should be on the first interactive element or the close button.
Must be dismissible via ESC key and clicking the overlay.
Use role='dialog' and aria-modal='true'. Focus must return to trigger element on close.

styling_guidelines.scrim: bg-black/50 or bg-slate-900/80 backdrop-blur-sm for depth.
styling_guidelines.panel: Max width defined (max-w-md, max-w-lg), vertically and horizontally centered.
styling_guidelines.z_index: Ensure it sits above all other elements (z-50).

name: Input Field

interaction_states.default: Border subtle, background surface or transparent.
interaction_states.hover: Slightly darken/lighten border depending on theme.
interaction_states.focus: Highlight border with brand primary, apply focus ring outline-offset-2.
interaction_states.error: Border destructive red, text red, optional shake animation.

accessibility_rules: Label must be explicitly tied to input via id/htmlFor.
Never use placeholder as a replacement for a visible label.
Error messages and helper text must use aria-describedby linked to the input.

styling_guidelines.height: Match button heights (e.g., h-10 for base, h-12 for lg).
styling_guidelines.spacing: Gap of 4px-8px between label, input, and helper text.

conversion_notes: Use auto-complete attributes to reduce friction. Minimize required fields.

name: Select / Dropdown

interaction_states.default: Looks similar to an input field but with a chevron.
interaction_states.open: Trigger chevron rotates 180deg. Menu animates in (fade + scale-95 to scale-100).

accessibility_rules: Trigger needs aria-haspopup='listbox' and aria-expanded.
Menu needs role='listbox'. Items need role='option' and aria-selected.
Keyboard navigation: Up/Down arrows to traverse options, Enter/Space to select, Esc to close.

styling_guidelines.z_index: Menu must be elevated (z-40 or z-50) with shadow-lg.

name: Data Table

interaction_states.row_hover: bg-muted/50 to help eye tracking across wide screens.
interaction_states.sort_active: Highlight column header text and show directional arrow.
interaction_states.row_selected: bg-primary/5 or bg-blue-50 to indicate selection.

accessibility_rules: Use semantic <table>, <thead>, <tbody>, <tr>, <th>, <td>.
Include scope='col' or scope='row' on header cells.
Ensure horizontal scrolling on small screens does not break page layout (use overflow-x-auto container).

styling_guidelines.alignment: Numbers right-aligned, text left-aligned, status badges centered.
styling_guidelines.density: Provide compact (py-2) and relaxed (py-4) cell padding options.
styling_guidelines.borders: Subtle border-b on rows. Avoid vertical borders unless highly data-dense.

name: Tabs

interaction_states.hover: Text color darkens, subtle background shift.
interaction_states.active: Primary text color. Active indicator (underline or pill background) becomes visible.
interaction_states.focus: Focus ring around the specific tab trigger.

accessibility_rules: TabList needs role='tablist'.
Triggers need role='tab', aria-selected, and aria-controls linking to panel.
Panels need role='tabpanel' and aria-labelledby linking to trigger.
Keyboard navigation: Left/Right arrows switch tabs (automatic or manual activation).

styling_guidelines.active_indicator: Use Framer Motion or layout animations to slide the underline/pill smoothly between tabs.
styling_guidelines.spacing: Gap of 16px to 32px between horizontal tabs.

name: Accordion

interaction_states.hover: Header background slightly darkens or title text changes color.
interaction_states.expanded: Chevron rotates 180deg (or Plus becomes Minus). Content panel slides down.
interaction_states.focus: Focus ring on the header trigger.

accessibility_rules: Header must be a <button> with aria-expanded='true/false' and aria-controls.
Content panel must have an id matching the aria-controls of the trigger.
Do not use display: none for animations if it breaks screen reader flow; use height animations carefully.

styling_guidelines.animation: Animate grid-template-rows from 0fr to 1fr for smooth height transitions without hardcoding heights.
styling_guidelines.spacing: py-4 for headers, pb-4 for content.

name: Toast / Notification

interaction_states.enter: Slide in from edge (e.g., bottom-right) and fade in.
interaction_states.exit: Slide out and fade out. Or shrink height to 0.

accessibility_rules: Region needs aria-live='polite' for info/success, aria-live='assertive' for errors.
Role should be 'status' or 'alert'.
Provide sufficient time to read (min 5 seconds) or allow manual dismissal.

styling_guidelines.position: Fixed to corners (bottom-right on desktop, top-center or bottom-center on mobile).
styling_guidelines.shadow: Deep shadow (shadow-lg or shadow-xl) for clear separation.

name: Avatar

interaction_states.hover: If clickable, slight scale or opacity change.

accessibility_rules: If informative, provide alt text (e.g., 'Profile picture of John Doe').
If decorative (name is right next to it), use alt=''.

styling_guidelines.sizes: Standard scale: xs(24px), sm(32px), md(40px), lg(48px), xl(64px).
styling_guidelines.fallback: Use brand primary color with 10-20% opacity and primary colored text for initials.

name: Badge

interaction_states.hover: Only changes state if it contains a remove button or acts as a filter tag.

accessibility_rules: If conveying status (e.g., red for Error), color must not be the only indicator. Use text or an icon.
If it's a filter tag, treat it as a button with aria-pressed or a checkbox.

styling_guidelines.typography: text-xs or text-sm, font-medium, uppercase tracking-wide (optional).
styling_guidelines.colors: Subtle variants work best: bg-blue-100 text-blue-800.

name: Breadcrumb

interaction_states.hover: Links get underline or color change.
interaction_states.current: Non-clickable, muted or bold text to indicate current location.

accessibility_rules: Wrap in <nav aria-label='Breadcrumb'>.
Use an ordered list <ol> to convey sequence.
Current page should have aria-current='page'.
Hide separators from screen readers (aria-hidden='true').

name: Checkbox / Radio

interaction_states.checked: Background and border become primary color. Icon animates in (scale or stroke-dashoffset).
interaction_states.focus: Focus ring around the custom control.

accessibility_rules: Must use visually hidden actual <input type='checkbox'> or <input type='radio'> for native semantics and form submission.
Label must be linked via htmlFor/id.
Ensure the click target includes the label text, not just the tiny box.

styling_guidelines.card_variant: When wrapping a whole card, apply ring/border to the card container on checked state.

name: Progress Bar

interaction_states.default: Indicator width/stroke-dashoffset transitions smoothly when value changes.

accessibility_rules: Use role='progressbar'.
Provide aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax.
If indeterminate, remove aria-valuenow.

styling_guidelines.track: bg-secondary or bg-muted. h-2 or h-3 for linear.

name: Skeleton

interaction_states.loading: Continuous pulse or shimmer animation (opacity 0.5 to 1, or linear gradient translation).

accessibility_rules: Should have aria-hidden='true'.
The container wrapping the skeletons should use aria-busy='true' and aria-live='polite'.

styling_guidelines.animation: animate-pulse (opacity) or a shimmer gradient moving left to right.

name: Slider

interaction_states.hover: Thumb slightly enlarges or shows shadow.
interaction_states.active/drag: Thumb scales up, value tooltip appears.

accessibility_rules: Thumb must be a <button> or <input type='range'>.
Needs role='slider', aria-valuemin, max, now.
Keyboard: Left/Right arrows increment/decrement. PageUp/PageDown for larger steps.

styling_guidelines.thumb: w-5 h-5, rounded-full, bg-white, border-2 border-primary, shadow-sm.

name: Switch / Toggle

interaction_states.checked: Track becomes primary color. Thumb translates to the right.

accessibility_rules: Use <button role='switch'>.
Must have aria-checked='true' or 'false'.
Must have an accessible label.

styling_guidelines.thumb: w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-white transition-transform duration-200.

name: Tooltip

interaction_states.hover: Wait 200ms delay, then animate in (fade + slight translation).

accessibility_rules: Use role='tooltip'.
Trigger must have aria-describedby pointing to the tooltip id.
Must not trap focus. Must dismiss on ESC.

styling_guidelines.colors: Usually inverse of the theme (dark bg on light mode) for high contrast.

name: Pagination

interaction_states.current: Primary background and text color, bold.

accessibility_rules: Wrap in <nav aria-label='Pagination'>.
Current page needs aria-current='page'.
Buttons need clear aria-labels (e.g., 'Go to page 2').

styling_guidelines.sizing: w-9 h-9 or w-10 h-10 for touch targets.
styling_guidelines.layout: Flex container with gap-1 or gap-2.

name: Hero Section (Page Level)

interaction_states.load: Staggered fade-in: Eyebrow (0ms) -> H1 (100ms) -> Subhead (200ms) -> CTAs (300ms) -> Media (400ms).

accessibility_rules: H1 must be the first heading on the page.
Background images must have sufficient contrast with overlay text (ratio > 4.5:1).
Do not auto-play background video if prefers-reduced-motion is true.

styling_guidelines.typography: H1 should be text-5xl md:text-7xl font-extrabold tracking-tight. Subheadline text-xl text-muted-foreground max-w-2xl.

conversion_notes: The primary CTA must be immediately visible above the fold. Trust bar (logos of clients) directly below the hero massively boosts credibility.

name: Pricing Section (Page Level)
accessibility_rules: Toggle must be a semantic switch or radio group.
Screen readers must announce the billing cycle clearly with the price (e.g., '$29 per month').

styling_guidelines.highlight: The 'Pro' or 'Recommended' tier should have a distinctive border (e.g., ring-2 ring-primary), an elevated shadow, and a badge.
styling_guidelines.features: Use green checkmarks for included, grey dashes/crosses for excluded.

conversion_notes: Leverage Von Restorff effect to make one tier stand out. Frame yearly plans with 'Save 20%' badges. Limit choices to 3 to avoid Hick's Law paralysis.

name: Feature Grid / Bento Box (Page Level)

interaction_states.hover: Cards show subtle gradient shifts, inner illustrations perform micro-animations.

accessibility_rules: Ensure reading order is logical (left-to-right, top-to-bottom) despite grid placements.
Icons should be decorative (aria-hidden) if the text explains the feature.

styling_guidelines.grid: Use CSS Grid. For Bento: auto-rows, spanning columns/rows (col-span-2, row-span-2).

name: Authentication Form (Page Level)

interaction_states.submit: Button shows loading state, inputs become disabled.
interaction_states.error: Inline error messages appear below inputs.

accessibility_rules: Use proper autocomplete attributes (autocomplete='email', autocomplete='current-password').
Form must be navigable entirely by keyboard. Submit on Enter.

styling_guidelines.layout: Flex column with gap-4 or gap-6.

conversion_notes: Minimize fields. Don't ask for Confirm Password on signup. Use OAuth for frictionless entry.
